## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter is valid YAML (`name`, `description`, `triggers`)
- [ ] `name` matches the filename (without `.skill.md`)
- [ ] H1 heading is the first content line
- [ ] Instructions are actionable and include examples
- [ ] README.md updated (if adding a new skill)
- [ ] No sensitive data or credentials included
